overview: A highly immersive, modern, minimal commercial leasing and real estate website for Grow Big Leasing & Real Estate based in Udaipur, Rajasthan. The platform positions the business as Udaipur's modern commercial opportunity network — alive, smooth, conversion-focused — with a hero slideshow, service cards, property showcase with detail modals, animated stats, testimonials, and sticky WhatsApp CTAs.
features: Cinematic hero with 3-4 image slideshow and dual CTAs
7 service category cards with immersive hover effects
Property showcase with 6 sample listings and detailed popup modals
Property modals with image gallery, pricing, description, and WhatsApp CTA
